title: Slime Chunk Locater
description: Tells you when you're in a slime chunk in debug (F3) Menu.
body:
### What It Does
Slime Chunk Locater is a lightweight Fabric mod that integrates with the F3 debug screen to display whether the current chunk is a slime chunk. The mod adds a new debug line which indicates wether you are in a slime chunk or not.

### How to Use
Once in-game, press F3 to open the debug screen. You will see a new line labeled “Slime Chunk” displaying the status of your current chunk.
#

This mod currently does not work on servers. This is one of my first mods, so bear with me!
